rationale: The Datastores tab was the default landing page on data.heroku.com. After November 5, 2025, the Dataclips tab became the default landing page instead. A new Datastores tab was added to the main Heroku Dashboard, making it the primary location to access datastores for personal/team accounts. On January 12, 2026, the Datastores tab was completely removed from data.heroku.com.
